case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES VS DIAZ, DINO

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 487423 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, DINO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIAZ, DINO $977.72 PRINCIPAL, $975.84 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,967.56, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE NO. 487423.
